meta.title: Ignify — Ignite Your Marketing with AI
meta.description: The all-in-one AI-powered marketing platform that creates content, manages campaigns, optimizes ads, and drives growth for modern businesses.
meta.keywords: AI marketing, marketing automation, content generation, ads orchestrator, SEO, CRM, social media scheduling, Ignify

hero.title: Ignite Your Marketing
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one AI-powered marketing platform that creates content, manages campaigns, optimizes ads, and drives growth — so you can focus on what matters most.

features.title: Everything You Need to
features.subtitle: Seven powerful modules working together to transform your marketing from guesswork into a data-driven growth engine.

ai_strategy.title: AI Strategy Planner
ai_strategy.description: Get a complete 30/60/90-day marketing plan generated by AI: market analysis, buyer personas, channel mix, content calendar, and measurable KPIs — ready to approve and execute.

content_engine.title: Content Engine
content_engine.description: Generate blog posts, social captions, email copy, and landing pages in seconds. Our AI understands your brand voice and creates content that converts.

creative_studio.title: Creative Studio
creative_studio.description: Design stunning visuals, banners, and social media graphics without a designer. AI-powered templates that match your brand identity perfectly.

ads_orchestrator.title: Ads Orchestrator
ads_orchestrator.description: Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns across Google, Meta, TikTok, and more from a single dashboard. AI auto-optimizes for maximum ROAS.

seo_intelligence.title: SEO Intelligence
seo_intelligence.description: Dominate search rankings with AI-driven keyword research, content optimization, technical audits, and competitor analysis — all automated.

social_media.title: Social Media Hub
social_media.description: Schedule, publish, and analyze posts across all platforms. AI suggests the best times, hashtags, and content formats for maximum engagement.

lead_crm.title: Lead CRM
lead_crm.description: Capture, score, and nurture leads automatically. AI identifies your hottest prospects and triggers personalized outreach at the perfect moment.

how_it_works.title: How It
how_it_works.subtitle: Get started in minutes, not months. Four simple steps to transform your marketing.
how_it_works.plan_highlight: AI generates your plan in 2 minutes

step0.title: Plan
step0.description: Answer a few questions about your business and goals. AI generates a complete 30/60/90-day marketing plan in 2 minutes — personas, channels, content calendar, and KPIs included.

step1.title: Connect
step1.description: Link your existing marketing channels, social accounts, and ad platforms. Ignify syncs everything in minutes and analyzes your current performance.

step2.title: Create
step2.description: Let AI generate optimized content, creatives, and campaigns tailored to your audience. Review, tweak, and approve — or let autopilot handle it all.

step3.title: Grow
step3.description: Watch your metrics soar as AI continuously optimizes every campaign, piece of content, and ad dollar. Real-time analytics show you exactly what's working.

testimonials.title: Loved by
testimonials.subtitle: See how businesses like yours are achieving incredible results with Ignify.

items.quote: Before Ignify I paid an agency $1,200/month for mediocre content. Now at half the price, my boutique's sales tripled last holiday season. The content writes itself and I'm finally free to focus on my customers.
items.name: Leila Mahmoud

items.quote: I used to spend entire nights shooting and editing content for the restaurant. Today, three clicks and I have a pro Instagram story ready. Holiday bookings went up 4x.
items.name: Ahmed Al-Sabbagh

items.quote: I'm a dentist, not a marketer. Ignify writes trusted medical posts and answers patient questions on WhatsApp all day. My calendar is fully booked two months out.
items.name: Dr. Maryam Al-Otaibi

t1.quote: Ignify replaced our entire marketing stack. We went from 5 different tools to one platform, and our results actually improved by 340%.
t1.name: Sarah Chen

t2.quote: The ads orchestrator is a game-changer. We cut our cost per acquisition by 60% in the first month.
t2.name: Marcus Rodriguez

t3.quote: As a small business owner, Ignify gives me enterprise-level marketing capabilities at a fraction of the cost. Our revenue doubled in 3 months.
t3.name: Aisha Patel

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits today — upgrade as you grow. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: For exploring the platform and testing AI outputs.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For solo founders and freelancers shipping content fast.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For growing teams running multi-channel campaigns.

agency.name: Agency
agency.tagline: For agencies managing multiple brands and clients.

items.q: Can I switch plans at any time?
items.a: Yes — upgrade or downgrade anytime from your dashboard. Changes are prorated on your next invoice.

items.q: What happens after the free trial?
items.a: After 14 days your account pauses automatically unless you pick a paid plan. Your data stays safe and you can reactivate anytime.

items.q: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
items.a: Yes — we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. See our Refund Policy for details.
We accept USD, EGP, SAR, and AED. Prices update automatically based on your selected currency.
We use bank-level encryption at rest and in transit, and comply with GDPR and regional privacy regulations. Your data is never used to train public models.

items.q: Can I use Ignify for multiple brands?
items.a: Pro supports up to 3 brand workspaces, and Agency supports unlimited brands with client separation and white-label reports.

items.q: Do you offer custom enterprise plans?
items.a: Yes — contact our sales team for custom volume, on-premise, and SLA-backed enterprise contracts.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, need a demo, or want to explore a partnership? Our team usually replies within one business day.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thanks — we received your message and will reply shortly.

about.title: Building the AI Marketing Platform of the Future
about.subtitle: Ignify is on a mission to make world-class marketing intelligence available to every business — from solo founders to global brands.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Give every business an AI marketing co-pilot that removes complexity, amplifies creativity, and turns marketing into a dependable growth engine — not a guessing game.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A world where the quality of your marketing is no longer limited by budget or headcount, but by the clarity of your ideas. We want Ignify to be the fastest path from idea to measurable growth.

members.name: Omar El-Sayed

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using Ignify (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms") and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service. These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("User," "you," or "your") and Ignify ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"). We may update these Terms from time to time, and we will notify you of material changes by email or through the Service. Your continued use of the Service after such notice constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
sections.body: Ignify is a software-as-a-service platform that provides AI-powered marketing automation tools, including but not limited to content generation, creative design, campaign management, search engine optimization, social media scheduling, lead customer relationship management, and analytics. The Service is provided "as-is" and "as-available." We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time, with or without notice. While we strive to maintain high availability, we do not guarantee uninterrupted access, and we are not liable for any downtime, data loss, or service interruptions except as expressly stated in a separate Service Level Agreement.

sections.heading: 3. Account Registration and Security
sections.body: To use most features of the Service, you must create an account by providing accurate, current, and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or any other breach of security. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that show signs of fraudulent activity, abuse, or violation of these Terms. You must be at least 18 years old, or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction, to create an account. Accounts are not transferable and may not be shared between individuals.

sections.heading: 4. Subscription, Billing, and Refunds
sections.body: The Service is offered on a subscription basis with monthly or annual billing cycles. By subscribing, you authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis until you cancel. Prices are listed on our pricing page and may change with at least 30 days' notice for existing subscriptions. All fees are exclusive of applicable taxes, which you are responsible for paying. You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Upon cancellation, you will retain access to paid features until the end of your current billing period. Refunds are governed by our separate Refund Policy, which is incorporated by reference into these Terms.

sections.heading: 5. User Content and Intellectual Property
sections.body: You retain all ownership rights to the content, data, and materials you upload, create, or submit to the Service ("User Content"). By submitting User Content, you grant Ignify a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to host, store, process, display, and transmit such content solely to provide and improve the Service. We will never sell your User Content or use it to train public AI models without your explicit, opt-in consent. All Ignify trademarks, software, and platform features are the exclusive property of the Company. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our Service or included software without prior written consent.

sections.heading: 6. Acceptable Use Policy
sections.body: You agree not to use the Service to: (a) violate any law or regulation; (b) infringe the intellectual property rights of others; (c) transmit malware, spam, or malicious code; (d) generate or distribute defamatory, obscene, or hateful content; (e) impersonate any person or entity; (f) interfere with or disrupt the integrity of the Service; (g) attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems; (h) reverse-engineer or scrape the Service; or (i) use AI outputs in a manner that is misleading, deceptive, or harmful. Violations may result in immediate suspension or termination of your account, with or without refund, at our sole discretion.

sections.heading: 7. Third-Party Integrations
sections.body: The Service may integrate with third-party platforms such as Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, and others. Your use of these integrations is subject to the respective third parties' terms and privacy policies, and we are not responsible for their practices or availability. You are responsible for maintaining valid authentication and compliance with each third party's usage policies. We may add, modify, or remove integrations at any time.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Ignify and its affiliates, officers, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, revenue, data, or business opportunities, arising out of or related to your use of the Service. Our aggregate liability for any claim arising under these Terms shall not exceed the amount you paid to Ignify in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the claim. Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of certain damages; in such cases, our liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by law.

sections.heading: 9. Indemnification
sections.body: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Ignify and its affiliates from any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or related to: (a) your use of the Service; (b) your User Content; (c) your violation of these Terms; or (d) your violation of any rights of a third party. We reserve the right, at our own expense, to assume exclusive defense and control of any matter subject to indemnification, and you agree to cooperate with us in asserting any available defenses.

sections.heading: 10. Termination, Governing Law, and Dispute Resolution
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time for material breach of these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately, and we may delete your account and associated data after a reasonable retention period. These Terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which Ignify is incorporated, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration, except that either party may seek injunctive relief in a court of competent jurisdiction for intellectual property or confidentiality matters. If any provision of these Terms is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.body: At Ignify ("we," "us," or "our"), we are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal data responsibly and transparently. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and protect information when you use our website, platform, and services (collectively, the "Service"). It applies to all users of the Service, including visitors, trial users, and paying customers. By using the Service, you consent to the practices described in this policy. If you do not agree, you should not use the Service. We may update this policy periodically; we will notify you of material changes by email or through the Service.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly — such as your name, email address, phone number, company name, payment information, and any content you upload — when you register, subscribe, contact support, or otherwise interact with us. We also automatically collect technical data when you use the Service, including IP address, browser type, device identifiers, operating system, referral URLs, pages visited, time spent, and usage patterns. When you connect third-party platforms (such as Google Ads, Meta, or TikTok), we collect the data those platforms make available through their APIs, strictly for the purpose of providing the features you have enabled.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to: (a) provide, operate, and improve the Service; (b) authenticate accounts and prevent fraud; (c) process payments and manage subscriptions; (d) personalize features and content; (e) send transactional notifications, service updates, and — with your consent — marketing communications; (f) respond to support requests; (g) analyze usage patterns to improve performance and develop new features; and (h) comply with legal obligations. We never sell your personal data. We only use your content to train AI models with your explicit opt-in consent, and we do not use customer data to train models that serve other customers.

sections.heading: 4. Legal Bases for Processing (GDPR)
sections.body: For users in the European Economic Area, we process personal data under the following legal bases: (a) performance of a contract, when processing is necessary to deliver the Service you subscribed to; (b) legitimate interests, such as improving the Service, preventing fraud, and communicating with customers; (c) consent, for marketing communications and optional data collection; and (d) legal obligations, when required to comply with applicable law. You may withdraw consent at any time without affecting processing based on consent before withdrawal.

sections.heading: 5. Sharing and Disclosure
sections.body: We share your information only with: (a) service providers and subprocessors who help us operate the Service (such as cloud hosting, email delivery, payment processing, and analytics), all of whom are bound by confidentiality obligations; (b) third-party platforms you explicitly connect to; (c) legal and regulatory authorities when required by law, subpoena, or court order; and (d) prospective buyers in the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, in which case we will notify you and ensure equivalent privacy protections remain in place. We do not sell, rent, or trade personal data to third parties for their marketing purposes.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. When you cancel your account, we delete or anonymize personal data within 90 days, except for data we are legally required to retain (such as billing and tax records) or that is necessary for legitimate business purposes (such as fraud prevention). You can request earlier deletion at any time, subject to these constraints.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
sections.body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to: (a) access the personal data we hold about you; (b) correct inaccurate or incomplete data; (c) request deletion of your data; (d) restrict or object to processing; (e) receive a portable copy of your data; and (f) withdraw consent for consent-based processing. To exercise any of these rights, email privacy@ignify.ai. We will respond within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

sections.heading: 8. Security
sections.body: We implement industry-standard technical and organizational safeguards to protect your data, including encryption at rest and in transit, strict access controls, regular security audits, continuous monitoring, and incident response procedures. However, no system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security. In the event of a data breach affecting your personal data, we will notify you and the relevant authorities in accordance with applicable law.

sections.heading: 9. International Data Transfers
sections.body: Your data may be processed and stored in countries other than your own, including the United States and the European Union. When we transfer data across borders, we implement appropriate safeguards, such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission, to ensure your data receives the same level of protection as in your home jurisdiction. If you have questions about specific transfers, contact us at privacy@ignify.ai.

sections.heading: 10. Cookies, Children, and Contact
sections.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate the Service, remember your preferences, and analyze usage. You can control cookies through your browser settings, though some features of the Service may not function properly without them. The Service is not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If we learn we have collected such data, we will delete it promptly. For any privacy-related questions or requests, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@ignify.ai.

sections.heading: 1. Overview
sections.body: At Ignify, we want every customer to feel confident subscribing to our Service. This Refund Policy explains when and how refunds are issued for subscriptions to the Ignify platform. It applies to all paid plans purchased directly from Ignify. Purchases made through third-party resellers or marketplaces may be subject to those channels' separate refund policies. By subscribing to a paid plan, you agree to the terms of this Refund Policy, which is incorporated by reference into our Terms of Service. We may update this policy from time to time; the version in effect at the time of your purchase governs that purchase.

sections.heading: 2. 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.body: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on first-time purchases of any paid subscription plan. If you are not satisfied with the Service for any reason within the first 30 days of your initial paid subscription, contact our support team at billing@ignify.ai to request a full refund. Refunds must be requested within 30 days of the initial charge. The guarantee applies only to your first subscription period (whether monthly or annual) and does not apply to renewals, upgrades, add-on services, or plan changes after the initial period.

sections.heading: 3. Annual Subscriptions
sections.body: For annual subscriptions, if you cancel after the 30-day money-back window, we do not provide prorated refunds for the unused portion of the subscription period, except where required by applicable consumer protection law. Your subscription will remain active until the end of the paid period, after which it will not renew. If you paid for an annual plan and wish to downgrade to a monthly plan, the change will take effect at the end of your current billing cycle and no refund will be issued for the unused portion, except as required by law.

sections.heading: 4. Monthly Subscriptions
sections.body: Monthly subscriptions may be cancelled at any time from your account settings. Upon cancellation, you will retain access to paid features through the end of the current billing period, and you will not be charged for the next month. We do not provide prorated refunds for partial months, except in the specific circumstances outlined in Section 6 below or where required by law. Fees already paid for the current monthly period are non-refundable after the 30-day guarantee window has passed.

sections.heading: 5. Exclusions from Refund
sections.body: The following are not eligible for refund under any circumstances: (a) accounts terminated for violation of our Terms of Service or Acceptable Use Policy; (b) fees for third-party services purchased through Ignify (such as ad spend, SMS credits, or premium integrations); (c) custom services, onboarding, or professional services fees, unless otherwise specified in a signed agreement; (d) enterprise contracts, which are governed by their separate refund terms; and (e) AI usage credits or other consumable resources that have been used, in whole or in part.

sections.heading: 6. Exceptional Refund Circumstances and How to Request
sections.body: We may, at our sole discretion, issue partial or full refunds outside the 30-day window in exceptional circumstances, such as extended service outages attributable to Ignify, duplicate charges, or billing errors. Decisions are made case-by-case. To request a refund, email billing@ignify.ai with your account email, the transaction date and amount, and a brief reason for your request. We will respond within five (5) business days and, if approved, process the refund to your original payment method within ten (10) business days. Depending on your payment provider, funds may take an additional 3-10 business days to appear in your account. If you disagree with a refund decision, you may escalate by requesting review by our billing leadership. This policy does not limit any statutory rights you may have under applicable consumer law.
